metadata.title: Leonel — Full-Stack Engineer
metadata.description: I ship products end-to-end and leverage AI to make them 10x more powerful.

home.meta_description: Full-Stack Engineer who ships end-to-end products — from infra and backend to frontend — and integrates AI, agents, and LLMs to make them 10x more powerful.

hero.title: Full-Stack Engineer
hero.subtitle: I ship products end-to-end — from infrastructure and DevOps to backend and frontend — and leverage AI, agents, and LLMs to make them 10x more powerful.
hero.available_description: Open to shipping products end-to-end, consulting, and open-source work.

about.title: About Me
about.paragraph_1: I'm a Full-Stack Engineer who ships entire products as a one-man army — from infrastructure and DevOps, through backend APIs and databases, to polished frontends. When a product needs AI capabilities, I integrate LLMs, agentic workflows, and intelligent automation to make it dramatically more powerful.
about.paragraph_2: Currently, I'm building <nexora>Nexora Group</nexora>, a software consultancy where I deliver end-to-end digital products. I work across the entire stack — React and Next.js frontends, Python and Node.js backends, PostgreSQL databases, Docker infrastructure — and layer in AI when it creates real value.
about.paragraph_3: I'm bilingual (English/Spanish) and based in Latin America. Whether you need someone to take a product from zero to production, add AI capabilities to an existing platform, or just an experienced engineer who ships — I'm open to the conversation.

skills.title: Tech Stack
skills.subtitle: Tools and technologies I work with daily.
skills.layers_description: Layered tiers of proficiency — from deep expertise to AI-augmented reach.
skills.agent_layer_description: My job is to solve the problem with the best tool available — not the closest one. AI agents make that possible by turning any technology into a productive one.
